message:
feat(core): add safe-merge taxonomy classifier with pairwise commutativity tests

Introduce a test-only merge taxonomy that classifies pairs of concurrent
filesystem mutations as Safe or Unsafe for merge, with proof obligation
tracking. This is the executable guardrail for bd-m5wf.3.2's future
semantic merge engine.

The classifier covers 8 mutation families: DataBlockWrite (safe when
disjoint), DirectoryAdd (safe for distinct names), DirectoryRemove/Rename
(always unsafe), XattrUpdate (safe when disjoint keys), ExtentUpdate
(safe when non-overlapping without size changes), BitmapUpdate (always
unsafe), InodeMetadata (safe for timestamp-only), and mixed-family pairs
(always unsafe). Each safe classification carries explicit proof
obligations.

8 tests exercise every verdict branch.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
